routing_notes: Curmudgeon c1 of EXP-255 recommended SPOT-CHECK (single-pass) for the rework, not full re-review. The four critical+moderate holes are fixed; substance unchanged.
curmudgeon_spot_check_questions: Does grep -c 'class="ds-scorecard ds-sc-hero"' build-scripts/generate-html.js return 1 BEFORE the patch? (anchor sanity)
After applying both patches in memory, does grep -c 'class="ds-thesis-hero"' return 1 and grep -c 'class="ds-scorecard ds-sc-hero"' return 0?
Are all 14 new classes ds- prefixed? (no orphans matching thesis-hero/thesis-statement/etc. without ds- prefix)
Is the load_bearing_content_audit_v2 explicit about the zero-falsifications phrase loss? (curmudgeon H4)
summary_for_decider: EXP-261 rework READY. All four critical+moderate curmudgeon c1 holes (H1 anchors, H2 verification gate, H3 ds- prefix, H4 audit correction) addressed in one EXP. Two minor holes (H6 dark-mode pulse, H7 textnum asymmetry) deferred per HNOTE explicit scope. Find anchors verified by grep against fresh clean clone (FC1 = 1 occurrence, FC2 = 1 occurrence each line). Dry-run patch in memory passes all post-patch invariants (15/15 OK). Recommended action: queue for curmudgeon spot-check. If spot-check passes, integrate; if it fails, bounce back with the failed check.
